title: uhpvp
description: I uh made uh a uh pvp modpack uhhhhhh
body:
**uhpvp is a high performance Minecraft modpack** built specifically for competitive PvP and maximum FPS. It features a carefully curated selection of top tier optimization and performance mods that significantly improve frame rates, stability, and overall responsiveness. The modpack is designed to run exceptionally well on both older low end systems and modern high end PCs, ensuring a smooth and consistent experience no matter your hardware.

**In addition to performance improvements, uhpvp focuses heavily on PvP functionality and visual clarity.** It includes essential combat focused features such as an armor durability bar that allows you to track your gear during fights, as well as some of the best PvP oriented texture packs available. These packs reduce visual clutter, enhance visibility, and make it easier to spot and track opponents in fast paced combat scenarios.

**uhpvp avoids unnecessary bloat** and keeps everything centered around what matters most: performance, clarity, and competitive advantage. Whether you are playing on a budget laptop or a high end gaming system, this modpack transforms Minecraft into a faster, smoother, and more PvP optimized experience that gives you a real edge in every fight.



### **Please report any bugs to the discord server**
